notes: This is a catering/banquet menu for The Ram Northgate (gastropub, Seattle), covering buffet packages, chafer-style breakfast/theme menus, and à la carte party tray appetizers. Some text appears to bleed in from a separate Stonehouse (Boise) venue's event info page, which has been noted but not inventoried as dishes. No regular à la carte dinner menu or beverage list was captured. Slider bun add-on price was illegible ('$??') and marked null.

dishes.name: Caesar Salad
dishes.description: Crisp romaine, garlic croutons, tossed with caesar dressing and Parmesan.

dishes.name: Mixed Green Salad
dishes.description: Mixed greens topped with diced tomatoes, sliced red onion, garlic croutons. Choice of dressing: Buttermilk Ranch, Honey-mustard, Thousand Island, Italian.

dishes.name: Fiesta Layered Dip
dishes.description: Layers of black beans, sour cream, cheddar and jack cheese, tomatoes, roasted jalapeños, green chiles, avocado crema, pico de gallo. Served with tortilla chips.

dishes.name: Spinach & Artichoke Dip
dishes.description: Spinach, artichoke hearts, onion in a creamy sauce with Parmesan and romano cheese. Served with tortilla chips. (Vegetarian)

dishes.name: Domestic Cheese & Crackers
dishes.description: Cheddar, Swiss, Pepperjack cheese served with gourmet crackers.

dishes.name: Veggies & Dip
dishes.description: Fresh seasonal vegetables with buttermilk ranch dressing for dipping.

dishes.name: Mini Soft Taco Bar
dishes.description: Barbacoa Beef or Adobo Chicken, lettuce, cheddarjack cheese, sour cream, guacamole, pico de gallo, green chiles, salsa and tortillas. Beef & Chicken Combo available.
dishes.price_note: Per-person party tray pricing; Beef & Chicken Combo $21pp

dishes.name: Combo Sub Platter
dishes.description: Corned beef, turkey, roast beef, Swiss, cheddar, mayonnaise, mustard, lettuce, tomato, and onion on French baguette.

dishes.name: Bone-In Chicken Wings
dishes.description: All-natural wings, blue cheese dressing and celery sticks. Choice of two sauces: Buffalo, Ram BBQ, Teriyaki, Honey-Sriracha.

dishes.name: Turkey & Bacon Wraps
dishes.description: Thinly sliced turkey breast, applewood-smoked bacon, cream cheese, iceberg lettuce, tomato, mayonnaise and havarti cheese wrapped in a flour tortilla.

dishes.name: Fresh Fruit Medley
dishes.description: Fresh seasonal variety of fruit.

dishes.name: Meatballs
dishes.description: Meatballs with your choice of BBQ, marinara, Swedish style or Teriyaki sauce. Slider buns available as add-on.
dishes.price_note: Per-person party tray pricing; slider bun add-on price illegible

dishes.name: Hummus & Veggies
dishes.description: Chickpeas, roasted garlic, red pepper, sesame tahini and fresh lemon. Served with fresh cut vegetables and naan flat bread.

dishes.name: Bruschetta
dishes.description: Garlic baguette topped with tomato, red onion, basil, artichoke, garlic, balsamic vinegar, olive oil and parmesan.

dishes.name: Chimichurri Chicken
dishes.description: Buffet entrée option (Build Your Own Buffet, signature tier).
dishes.price_note: Included in $26/person Build Your Own Buffet (25-guest minimum); choose 2 signature entrées

dishes.name: Dessert Selection (Choice of One)
dishes.description: Choose one: Apple Bread Pudding, Cheesecake, Carrot Cake, or Chocolate Cake.

dishes.name: Early Riser Breakfast Package
dishes.description: Juice, coffee, muffins and mini bagels, whipped cream cheese.

dishes.name: Continental Buffet Breakfast Package
dishes.description: Fresh seasonal fruit platter, juices and a variety of pastries including muffins, mini bagels, whipped cream cheese.

dishes.name: Classic Breakfast Buffet Package
dishes.description: Fluffy scrambled eggs, applewood-smoked bacon, sausage patty, hashbrowns, fresh seasonal fruit and juice. Optional Eggs Benedict add-on.
dishes.price_note: $22/person chafer-style package, 25-guest minimum; Eggs Benedict add-on $3/person

dishes.name: BBQ Buffet Package
dishes.description: BBQ chicken and BBQ pulled pork. Served with kernel corn and zesty coleslaw.

dishes.name: All American Buffet Package
dishes.description: Grilled burgers and chicken breasts served with assorted cheeses, sautéed mushrooms and onions, tomatoes, lettuce, bacon, BBQ sauce and mayonnaise. Served with potato chips and green salad.

dishes.name: Southwestern Buffet Package
dishes.description: Beef and chicken fajitas with onions, red peppers, green chiles, Barbacoa Beef Enchiladas, served with sour cream, cheddarjack cheese, guacamole, flour tortillas, lettuce, tomatoes, jalapeños, seasonal rice and black beans. With chips and salsa.

dishes.name: Italian Buffet Package
dishes.description: Spaghetti and meatballs, lasagna and chicken parmesan. Accompanied by garlic bread and caesar salad.
